description:
attached_molecule: lc-wisp-qnxh
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-05T20:11:10Z
dispatched_by: mayor

Run the full Ghost Security scan pipeline on this rig's codebase. Execute these three skills in sequence:

1. Invoke /ghost-repo-context — maps the repo structure, detects projects, writes architecture summary to ~/.ghost/repos/<repo_id>/cache/repo.md
2. Invoke /ghost-scan-code — runs AI-powered SAST scan using the context from step 1; covers SQLi, XSS, SSRF, BOLA, path traversal, and other OWASP vectors. The codebase includes: NestJS/TypeScript backend (lilypad-chat-backend), React Native mobile app (lilypad-chat-mobile), Next.js website (lilypad-chat-website), and a Discourse instance.
3. Invoke /ghost-report — aggregates all scan findings into a prioritized report

Post findings summary to bead notes: total count, high/medium/low breakdown, top issues.
notes:
Security scan complete. 6 verified findings (2 high, 4 medium), 1 rejected.

HIGH:
1. CWE-287: JWT dev bypass in access-token.strategy.ts - dev tokens skip signature verification when NODE_ENV=local (default)
2. CWE-79: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML in geocache detail page - no DOMPurify sanitization

MEDIUM:
3. CWE-295: Missing cert pinning on mobile Axios client
4. CWE-295: Missing cert pinning in iOS Info.plist (no NSPinnedDomains)
5. CWE-798: Foursquare API secret hardcoded in .env.staging, baked into mobile binary
6. CWE-532: Discourse email processor logs raw email PII in plaintext

REJECTED:
- Admin panel client-side authz bypass: mitigated by backend RBAC (SystemSettingsController has @WithAdminAuth)

Report: ~/.ghost/repos/lilypad_chat-aecb7f8c/scans/bfb2bbd/report.md
Findings: ~/.ghost/repos/lilypad_chat-aecb7f8c/scans/bfb2bbd/code/findings/
title: Security scan: lilypad_chat

description:
attached_molecule: lc-wisp-8969
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-06T01:51:31Z
dispatched_by: lilypad_chat/crew/lilypad

Wire login/register to backend JWT stored in HTTP-only cookies (not localStorage). Add middleware.ts auth gate for server-side redirect on unauthenticated. Token refresh via cookie-based flow.
notes: Auth flow code exists (from lc-9et merge) but has gaps: (1) initializeAuth doesn't restore chatAuthToken on page refresh — returns early when user_info cookie exists without calling refreshSession. (2) Zustand logout only clears memory, doesn't call /api/auth/logout to clear HTTP-only cookies. (3) No auto-refresh on 401 in server-side API proxy routes — backend returns 401 on expired access token but routes don't retry with refresh.
title: F03: Auth flow completion
